reforms.description: The Finnish Government has moved towards deregulating the electricity market, which aims to enhance competition among companies and raise incentives for innovation and efficiency.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Deregulation is expected to foster competition, leading to increased innovation and efficiency in the market.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been put into effect as part of the government's strategy.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant structural change in the electricity market aimed at enhancing innovation.
reforms.source_quote: The Finnish Government has moved towards deregulating the electricity market in recent years.

reforms.description: The Finnish government has introduced measures targeting small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs), including the provision of risk capital and simpler administrative procedures to support their growth and innovation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By providing risk capital and reducing administrative burdens, the measures are designed to facilitate the growth of innovative SMEs.
reforms.status_evidence: The measures have been actively implemented to support SMEs.
reforms.importance_rationale: The measures represent a significant but narrower reform aimed at enhancing the startup ecosystem.
reforms.source_quote: Other measures have targeted small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs), including the provision of risk capital and the introduction of simpler administrative procedures.
